string.text: Hold your cursor over a weapon in your inventory or a corpse/crate you're looting, and press the key once. It detaches scope, then silencer, then GL, then field-strips all Weapon Parts Overhaul parts (Field strip -> Remove all) - one step every couple of frames, same actions as right-clicking each entry by hand, just automatic. Leave the key unbound to disable.
Write field-strip actions (hovered weapon, addons removed, parts removed) to the game log file.
